## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill update (new rules, references, etc.)
- [ ] Installer/infrastructure change

## Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md frontmatter `name` matches directory name
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] manifest.json updated (or will be auto-generated on release)
- [ ] Tested locally with `./install-skills.sh --dry-run`
